headline: W. R. Berkley Corporation Names Kirk A. Parker President of Berkley North Pacific
summary: GREENWICH, Conn., June 10, 2026--W. R. Berkley Corporation (NYSE: WRB) today announced the appointment of Kirk A. Parker as president of Berkley North Pacific. The appointment is effective immediately.
